executives.name: Helen Hardy
executives.background: Helen Hardy is an independent director. She has extensive experience in the energy sector, having served as Company Secretary of Origin Energy Limited.

executives.name: Sandra McInnes
executives.background: Sandra McInnes is the Chief Sustainability Officer, leading the Company's ESG strategy, health, safety, and community relations. She has extensive experience in corporate affairs and sustainability within the mining industry.
